title: 6PCS Worm on a String, Rainbow Magic Twisty Wiggly Worms, Wiggly Magic Worms Bulk Cat Toys Stress Relief Fidget Fiddle Toys for Trick Carnival Party Favors Kids Adults (Colour Random)
features: 【Twisty Fuzzy Worm Toys】You will receive 6 colourful caterpillars in green, yellow, orange, pink, blue and purple, colours are sent randomly, the size of the bugs is about 24cm long. Can be used to perform a variety of fun tricks and games!
【Quality Material】Magic Worm toy is made of soft plush material, feels especially comfortable in your hand, the two eyes look lifelike, very fun for kids and suitable for most people to play with.

【Novelty Toys for Pets】These magical gadgets can also be used as pet toys. When you hang it out of your pet's reach, your cat, dog or other pet will never be bored of chasing the magic bug toy again. You will be able to watch your pet chasing the magic bugs!

【Easy to Play】Each twisted worm has an invisible cord that lets you work your magic on your fingers, pencils, cups, etc. This little magic worm will amaze your audience as it moves and crawls around your hand. Can dance in a drinking glass or spin on a pencil.

【Perfect Gift】This toy is perfect for stress relief, autism, autism, SEN, ADHD, ADD, and is an ideal gift for anyone. Ideal for party favours, party bag fillers, children's rewards, wedding/birthday/Easter/Halloween and other party decoration accessories.
